title: Piquant Chewy German Beef Tagine
description: A mustardy, orange-infused beef tagine that feels like a nostalgic German comfort dish, yet simmered in a tagine pot for a chewy, savory bite.
instructions: Heat the slate tile over medium heat until hot.
Add the cubed beef to the stone, searing each side until browned, about 3 minutes per side.
Sprinkle the mustard over the beef, rubbing it in until coated.
Stir in minced garlic, oregano, and rosemary, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in the orange juice and beef broth, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Cover the tile with a lid or foil, reduce heat to low, and let the tagine cook for 60 minutes, stirring occasionally.
After cooking, check the beef tenderness; if not chewy enough, cook an extra 15 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper, serve hot directly from the slate tile.
